title: Personal Finance & Investment Clarity Hub — Notion Template
description:
Stop juggling spreadsheets, brokerage apps, and scattered notes. The Personal Finance & Investment Clarity Hub is an all-in-one Notion workspace that brings your entire financial life into sharp focus — in one place.

Track every investment holding across stocks, ETFs, crypto, real estate, and bonds. Log every buy, sell, dividend, and distribution. Monitor your true ROI — including passive income — with built-in formulas that do the math for you. Budget your monthly income and expenses alongside your investment activity so you always know how much you can put to work. Set meaningful financial goals and watch your progress update in real time.

Designed for the DIY investor who is financially literate but tired of building from scratch, this template includes 6 fully structured databases, 20+ pre-built views, a visual home dashboard, and a step-by-step getting-started guide. Whether you want to hit a $500K portfolio, generate $2K/month in passive income, or simply get a clear net worth snapshot every month — this hub gives you the clarity to make confident, data-driven decisions.

Duplicate once. Update weekly. Invest with confidence.
features: 6 interconnected databases cover holdings, transactions, distributions, budgeting, goals, and monthly snapshots — eliminating the need for multiple spreadsheets.
Pre-built ROI formulas automatically calculate unrealized gains, total returns including dividends, and overall portfolio performance without any manual math.
20+ curated database views let you analyze your portfolio by asset class, account, performance, and time period in just one click.
A visual Home Dashboard surfaces your total portfolio value, passive income, top performer, and financial goal progress the moment you open the workspace.
A built-in Monthly Snapshot Log creates a permanent historical record of your net worth and portfolio growth so you can visualize progress over months and years.

faq.q: Do I need to be an advanced Notion user to use this template?
faq.a: No. This template is designed for intermediate Notion users who are comfortable with databases and filters but do not want to build everything from scratch. All databases, formulas, relations, and views are pre-configured — you simply duplicate the template and start entering your data.

faq.q: Does this template automatically sync with my brokerage or pull live prices?
faq.a: Notion does not natively connect to external financial APIs, so live price syncing is not supported. You will update current prices and portfolio values manually — typically taking just a few minutes per week — which also keeps you intentionally engaged with your investments.

faq.q: Can I track multiple brokerage accounts and asset classes in one place?
faq.a: Absolutely. Every holding, transaction, and distribution includes an Account and Asset Class field, so you can filter, group, and compare across all your accounts — Fidelity, Robinhood, Coinbase, Vanguard, and more — side by side in a single workspace.
